issues.sample: TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2016 MAZDA 6. WHILE DRIVING 25 MPH, THE BRAKES FAILED WITHOUT WARNING. THE CONTACT WAS ABLE TO REGAIN BRAKE CONTROL WITHIN A FEW BLOCKS. THE VEHICLE WAS NOT DIAGNOSED OR REPAIRED. THE MANUFACTURER WAS NOT MADE AWARE OF THE ISSUE. THE FAILURE MILEAGE WAS 1,2

narrative.headline: What 2016 Mazda Mazda6 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 76 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Service Brakes (16% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
